name: Mexican Rice (Arroz Mexicana)
recipeIngredient: 2 beef bouillon cubes dissolved in 2 cups water
1 tablespoon minced parsley, fresh or dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large (12-inch) skillet over medium heat. Add rice and cook until it turns opaque yellow and all moisture is absorbed.
2. Stir to prevent burning.
3. Add onion and garlic; sauté until transparent.
4. Add bouillon, being careful as it will steam.
5. Stir in tomato paste, parsley, mushrooms, cumin, and coriander.
6. Reduce heat to low, cover the pan, and simmer for 20 minutes or until all liquid is absorbed.
7. Check occasionally and stir to prevent sticking.
